prompt: Create a production-ready 2D pixel-art CHIBI character sprite sheet on one perfectly flat, uniform chroma-key magenta background (#FF00FF), with absolutely no texture, shadow, glow or variation in the background. Exact grid: 4 equal columns by 3 equal rows, 12 full-body sprites total, no borders, no labels, no grid lines. Every sprite shows EXACTLY the same young lamplighter, side view facing right, same scale, same costume, same facial features and same ground baseline. Character: a charming and beautiful East Asian youth around 17 to 19 years old, literary and gentle, clean youthful face, large but calm expressive dark eyes, tousled short black hair, no hat. Refined chibi proportions around 3.5 heads tall: slightly enlarged head and hands, compact body, elegant rather than babyish, never toddler-like. Outfit for a fictional romantic old city: ivory high-collar shirt, fitted midnight-blue waistcoat, deep-navy short coat with a cape-like shoulder layer, slim charcoal trousers, polished dark brown ankle boots, restrained rust-red scarf, warm brass hand lantern. Clothing is clean, tailored and visually pleasing. Absolutely NO patches, NO torn fabric, NO cloth shoes, NO work cap, NO revolutionary uniform, NO Mao suit, NO military or peasant look, NO hardship imagery. Row 1: four-frame subtle idle breathing cycle. Row 2: four-frame lively readable walking cycle. Row 3: four-frame walking cycle while carefully carrying the lantern; lantern remains in the same hand with a compact amber glow. Style: premium literary chibi pixel art, romantic storybook atmosphere, delicate but crisp pixel clusters, highly readable silhouette, limited palette of midnight blue, charcoal, ivory, muted rust red and amber. No anti-aliasing, no soft blur, no gradients, no 3D, no extra props, no duplicated limbs, no cast shadow, no scenery. Leave generous magenta padding around every cell.
